summary: Comprehensive testing of Zitex Video Consultation System completed. All backend tests (14/14) passed. Frontend tests verified the video chat flow with 3 video types (Cinematic, Funny, Advertising) working correctly. The consultation flow shows proper button choices and AI asks relevant questions.
passed_tests: API POST /api/auth/login - Login with owner@zitex.com / owner123 successful
API GET /api/auth/me - Returns user info with is_owner status
API POST /api/chat/sessions - Creates video type session with welcome message
API POST /api/chat/sessions - Creates general session
API GET /api/chat/sessions - Returns list of user sessions
API POST /api/chat/sessions/{id}/messages - Advertising video request processed with consultation questions
API POST /api/chat/sessions/{id}/messages - Cinematic video request processed
API POST /api/chat/sessions/{id}/messages - Funny video request processed
API GET /api/pricing - Returns pricing config with service_costs
API GET /api/user/balance - Returns user credits and service costs
API GET /api/chat/templates - Returns available templates
API GET /api/chat/game-libraries - Returns game libraries
Full video consultation flow - Create session, send messages, verify responses
Welcome message contains [BUTTONS] tag with choice options
Frontend - Login flow works correctly
Frontend - Chat page loads with welcome screen
Frontend - Conversations dropdown shows sessions list
Frontend - New chat button creates session with welcome message
Frontend - Welcome message shows 5 choice buttons (موقع ويب, تطبيق ويب, لعبة, صفحة هبوط, فكرة أخرى)
Frontend - Video request triggers AI consultation with 4 video type buttons (سينمائي, مضحك, إعلاني/تجاري, نوع آخر)
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created during video consultation flow tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video consultation system fully functional. The system supports 3 video types: Cinematic (سينمائي), Funny (مضحك), and Advertising (إعلاني). The consultation flow works as follows: 1) User requests video, 2) AI asks about video type with choice buttons, 3) AI asks consultation questions based on type, 4) AI generates scenario, 5) AI shows cost breakdown, 6) Video generation (using Sora 2). SERVICE_COSTS in ai_chat_service.py defines costs for each video type and duration.

video_consultation_flow.details: AI asks consultation questions, shows choice buttons, and follows the flow: requirements → scenario → preview images → voice preview → cost breakdown → video generation

choice_buttons.details: Buttons render correctly and clicking them sends the button text as a message

ai_commands_processing.VIDEO_GENERATE: Processes video generation command with type, duration, prompt, voice_text, voice, size
ai_commands_processing.VOICE_PREVIEW: Generates voice preview using OpenAI TTS

code_review_notes.ai_chat_service.py: Well-structured with MASTER_SYSTEM_PROMPT containing detailed instructions for 3 video types. SERVICE_COSTS properly defined. _process_ai_commands handles VIDEO_GENERATE, VOICE_PREVIEW, IMAGE_PREVIEW commands.
code_review_notes.AIChat.js: ChoiceButtons component renders buttons correctly. parseMessageContent extracts [BUTTONS] tags. handleButtonClickDirect sends button text as message.
